name: Asher 60" Floor Lamp - FLL4094 - Brass - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Asher 60 inch brass iron floor lamp. Crafted entirely from iron, this lamp provides both function and flair. Its sleek brass finish adds a touch of sophistication to any room, making it an ideal choice for both cozy nooks and spacious living areas. 

Standing tall and elegant, the Asher lamp features an E26 socket, accommodating a variety of bulb types to suit your lighting preferences. Whether positioned by your favorite reading chair or complementing your office space, it seamlessly blends style with practicality.

Let the Asher floor lamp become a statement piece in your home. Its understated design allows it to harmonize effortlessly with your existing decor, offering both illumination and a touch of elegance. Discover the blend of form and function with this striking iron floor lamp, and transform your living spaces with ease.
